notes: Meshy image-to-3D queue -- HERO assets for scenes. Copy to meshy_queue.json, edit, then: python3 godot/tools/meshy_render.py godot/tools/meshy_queue.json. Set params.ai_model to the untextured T2 model id; keep should_texture false to stay in the vertex-color / Light3D pipeline. Raw GLBs land in assets/3d/meshy/<tag>/<slug>.glb -- then normalize with tools/blender/build_meshy_import.py before using in a scene.
